overall.description: First-person exploration of a modern, dimly lit luxury bathroom from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring sleek fixtures, a digital shower panel, contemporary vanity, and moody artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern shower enclosure with digital controls

agents.ego_description: examining the shower fixtures and digital control panel, looking up toward the rainfall showerhead

entered.detail: tan-colored digital shower control panel with multiple chrome knobs and buttons
large circular chrome rainfall showerhead mounted on extended arm
frosted glass shower door with dark frame
two chrome floating shelves mounted on the shower wall

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on a modern shower panel with digital controls and a large rainfall showerhead, panning slowly to reveal glass partitions and metal shelving in a dimly lit, enclosed shower space.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bathroom vanity with illuminated mirror

events.description: exits the enclosed shower stall into the open bathroom vanity area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the vanity area and observing the backlit mirror and warm overhead lighting

entered.detail: large rectangular mirror with frosted backlighting mounted above the vanity
warm rectangular wall-mounted light fixtures flanking the mirror
dark wood cabinet with chrome handles beneath the mirror
modern white upholstered chair with metal frame

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider bathroom space featuring a large backlit vanity mirror flanked by warm wall sconces, a dark wood cabinet, and a white upholstered chair, transitioning from the confined shower enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom sink and toilet area with modern fixtures

events.description: approaches sink basin for close inspection of water droplets and chrome fixtures

agents.ego_description: examining the sink basin closely then moving toward the toilet and exit door

entered.detail: modern rectangular sink basin with visible water droplets inside
chrome wall-mounted waterfall faucet above the sink
green-tinted glass soap dispenser on the vanity counter
pink and white rolled towels stacked on the counter
modern white toilet with chrome flush mechanism
square chrome trash can beside the toilet
dark wood sliding door with frosted glass panel
small white cabinet with modern lamp beside the toilet

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a rectangular sink basin with visible water droplets and modern chrome fixtures, then pans to reveal the toilet area, metal trash can, and a wooden sliding door in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the confined, technical space of a shower enclosure into the open, moody atmosphere of a luxury bathroom. It begins with a close focus on a modern shower panel and rainfall showerhead, panning slowly across glass partitions and metal shelving within the dimly lit stall. As the camera moves outward, the space expands to reveal a large backlit vanity mirror flanked by warm wall sconces, a dark wood cabinet, and a white upholstered chair. The scene then shifts toward a rectangular sink basin glistening with water droplets and chrome fixtures before finally panning across the toilet area and a metal trash can toward a wooden sliding door in the background.
